phases.name: Write benchmark types and loader tests
phases.reasoning: Write all 6 tests from the TDD sequence: expected JSON parsing, load case from directory, discover suite cases, empty dir handling, missing file errors, and skip non-directories. Create src/cmd/autoresearch/benchmarks.rs with test module and src/cmd/autoresearch/mod.rs, wire into src/cmd/mod.rs. Tests will not compile yet since types don't exist.

phases.name: Implement benchmark types and loader
phases.reasoning: Implement ExpectedFinding, MustNotFlag, Expected, BenchmarkCase, BenchmarkSuite types with serde derives. Implement BenchmarkCase::load() to read code.rs/context.md/expected.json with anyhow context errors. Implement BenchmarkSuite::load() with directory discovery, non-dir filtering, and name sorting. Add BenchmarkSuite::specialist_names() helper. All 6 tests must pass, cargo clippy must be clean.
